summary:
Detailed step-by-step implementation guide for Modules 5, 6, and 7 of the Cape Coast Urban Geomorphology project. 

Module 5 covers Spatiotemporal Relationship Analysis (RO3) including LULC-Slope and LULC-TWI overlay cross-tabulation, grid-cell zonal statistics, correlation analysis, and regression modeling.

Module 6 covers Hazard Vulnerability Mapping (RO4) using the Multi-Criteria Weighted Overlay (AHP) method, mapping flood/landslide susceptibility, and calculating community exposure.

Module 7 covers Policy & Management Synthesis, detailing sustainable urban drainage systems (SuDS), coastal defense strategies, zoning regulations, and final thesis mapping layouts.

Includes sample Python script for running spatial statistics and correlation analysis.
